scores.correctness_notes: The gold standard focuses on the data schema (application-data with name/model/port, unit-data with host) and notes the Python API is in the traefik-k8s-operator repo, not charmlibs docs. The agent provides Python API usage instead of the schema. Also uses v2 while gold standard cites v1 as the recommended library.
scores.hallucination_notes: Uses v2 instead of v1. Specific parameters like strip_prefix, redirect_https, scheme, and provide_ingress_requirements method, plus event names on.ready/on.revoked and url property — these are plausible but go well beyond what the gold standard source documents. IngressPerAppRequirer is mentioned in the gold standard, but the rest of the API details are unverified against the source material.
